llm_eval.notes: Well-documented read-only contract test; clear C1-C4 gates with correct exit semantics (0/1); no destructive side effects; runs exit 0 on real repo. Minor: load_schema/c4 index schema['properties']['パターン'] unguarded -> KeyError/OSError on malformed schema (repo-controlled); regex extraction of project_db_properties is brittle; no PEP723 frontmatter.
